name: Grey Wardens
description: The Grey Wardens are a faction of guardians who watch over the prisons of the Chaos Dragons and hold back the tide of chaos.

attributes.recruitment: takes broken individuals and forges them into new, loyal members through a brutal crucible
attributes.secrecy: operates from isolated fortresses; its internal structure is a complete secret, but its existence is known
attributes.ultimate_goal: to guard the prisons of the Chaos Dragons and hold back the tide of chaos, preserving reality

stats.modular_arsenal: dual-wield small scimitars and sickle-like hook blades that can lock together into a double-ended short staff
stats.master_scimitar: used by the Eyeless, this heavy blade features bladed dusters on the grip and a spiked pommel
stats.sigil_thread_system: metal threads sewn into their robes channel chaos energy into devastating powers
stats.logic_of_reaction: follow a 'See, Decide, React' philosophy; they will save those in danger but show no nuance in judgment
